primary_success.description: The evolution loop opens: at least one schema-valid slow edit enters paired replay and receives a non-INCONCLUSIVE scientific verdict.

diagnostic_readouts.envelope_valid_rate: report numerator and denominator; expected at least run-1 rate
diagnostic_readouts.schema_validation_retry_count: count only stage-validation-error/1 corrections; report per slow attempt and flag more than one
diagnostic_readouts.supplied_noop_case_rate: exact PROGRAM byte-equivalence, expected below 12/36 but not a primary gate
diagnostic_readouts.probe_selection_contradiction_case_count: expected 3-5 but not a gate because corpus-v2 features may change routing
diagnostic_readouts.slow_edit_ast_pass_rate: report valid manifests plus explicit no-proposal envelopes over slow attempts
diagnostic_readouts.first_supported_edit_and_promotion: report IDs, surfaces, verdicts and lineage receipts
diagnostic_readouts.harness_sha_transition: report H0 start SHA and final active SHA
diagnostic_readouts.family_effect_distinct_supply_rate: report all four target families separately

expectation_management.level_shift: May improve immediately because corrected public features expose region and offset parameters.
expectation_management.impulsive_outlier: Localization may remain weak; that is intended work for Harness evolution and is not by itself an instrument failure.
expectation_management.period_change: Correct identity plus OPERATOR_GAP remains success at the Agent layer and backlog at the system layer.
